rules.name: Dead Dashboard Removal
rules.action: Collapse dashboard into primary tool view (e.g., Compliance dashboard → Compliance Center landing page). Remove standalone dashboard route. Redirect legacy URLs.
rules.expected_impact: Reduce navigation items by 4; simplify information architecture; users land directly on actionable tools

rules.name: Sidebar Personalization
rules.action: Reorder sidebar sections per user based on 30-day visit frequency. Pin top-3 sections to top. Auto-collapse sections below 2% visit rate. Add 'Suggested' section for next-likely-action based on Markov chain prediction.
rules.expected_impact: Reduce time-to-target page by estimated 35%; improve feature discoverability for underused tools

rules.name: AI Dock Confidence Display
rules.action: Always display confidence tier badge (Very High/High/Moderate/Low/Speculative) with color coding. For confidence < 0.65, auto-expand uncertainty explanation. Show source citations inline as numbered links.
rules.expected_impact: Increase AI response trust rating from 3.2/5 to 4.1/5; increase AI Dock engagement by 25%

rules.name: Command Palette Acceleration
rules.action: Pre-load top-20 commands per user role. Rank by: (personal_frequency * 0.5) + (role_frequency * 0.3) + (recency * 0.2). Show inline keyboard shortcut hints. Add AI-powered natural language command input ('create rose formula under $50/kg').
rules.expected_impact: Power user workflow acceleration; 40% reduction in mouse-dependent navigation for keyboard users

rules.name: Empty State Intelligence
rules.action: Replace generic 'No data yet' with AI-generated starter suggestions: sample formulas, recommended materials, project templates, or guided onboarding wizard based on user role and company segment.
rules.expected_impact: Reduce 5-minute time-to-value to <60 seconds; increase first-session task completion from 32% to 65%

rules.name: Recommendation Proactivity
rules.action: Instead of passive 'See Recommendations' button, surface top recommendation as an inline banner with confidence score. 'We found a 26% cost reduction opportunity for this formula — review suggestion'. One-click apply with undo.
rules.expected_impact: Increase recommendation acceptance from 39% to 55%; reduce cost-optimization discovery time from 8 minutes to 30 seconds

rules.name: Notification Streamlining
rules.action: Group low-priority notifications into digest (delivered every 4 hours). Only real-time for: compliance violation, team member action on shared formula, security alert, AI recommendation. Route to email for idle users (>24h offline).
rules.expected_impact: Reduce notification fatigue; increase notification action rate from 12% to 28%

rules.name: Executive View Simplification
rules.action: Replace full sidebar navigation with 4-item command bar: Dashboard, AI Insights, Team, Settings. Show AI Insights Feed as primary content (replacing static KPI widgets). Surface one 'Decision Required' item per visit.
rules.expected_impact: Reduce executive time-to-insight from 6.2 minutes to 90 seconds; increase executive login frequency

rules.name: Role-Specific Onboarding
rules.action: Detect role → show role-specific onboarding flow: Perfumer sees formula creation; Manager sees project setup; Executive sees metric explanation; Employee sees task list. Skip generic tours.
rules.expected_impact: Increase 7-day activation rate from 41% to 68%; reduce support tickets from new users by 40%

rules.name: Search Index Optimization
rules.action: Pre-build material search index at build time. Deploy client-side search with WASM-compressed index for sub-50ms response. Fallback to server-side search for queries with >500 results.
rules.expected_impact: Reduce search abandonment from 12% to 4%; improve material catalog satisfaction from 'medium' to 'high'
